hero.title: One app for every step of buying, building, and selling property

introduction.text: Bhu Master set out to give India's real estate and construction market a single, unified digital home — for browsing properties, finding professionals, and sourcing materials.

challenge.text: Buyers, sellers, and builders were relying on fragmented tools — one app for listings, another for finding contractors, manual calls for material sourcing. Bhu Master needed a single, unified experience that could serve every stakeholder in the property journey.

solution.text: Trai Inc built native Android and iOS apps covering three core pillars: property discovery with powerful search and filters, a professional network connecting users with architects, engineers, and legal advisors, and a material-sourcing marketplace for construction needs — all in one platform.

results.text: Bhu Master is live on the Google Play Store and App Store, giving property buyers, sellers, and construction professionals a single platform to manage their entire journey.

hero.title: Every home service, one platform — from booking to backend

introduction.text: Workezy set out to connect customers with verified home-service professionals — maids, electricians, drivers, gardeners, and more — across Lucknow, through one trusted platform.

challenge.text: People needing everyday household help had no single, secure place to find and book verified professionals. At the same time, skilled workers had no organized way to reach steady customers. Workezy needed a platform that solved both sides of that gap — for customers and service providers alike.

solution.text: Trai Inc delivered the complete digital ecosystem: native Android and iOS apps for customers to browse and book services, a dedicated Service Partners app for professionals to manage their bookings, a public website for discovery and onboarding, a CRM to manage bookings and provider relationships, and ongoing social media management to build the brand.

results.text: Workezy is live on the Google Play Store and App Store — both the customer app and the Service Partners app — rated 4.0★, giving customers a trusted way to book home services and giving professionals steady access to work.

hero.title: A digital front door and backend system for pharmaceutical distribution

introduction.text: Dashak Pharma needed a professional online presence and a system to manage its distribution operations — built for the pace and reliability the pharmaceutical industry demands.

challenge.text: As a pharmaceutical distribution business, Dashak Pharma needed to present its product range and credibility online, while also having a reliable system behind the scenes to manage customer relationships, orders, and follow-ups — without relying on manual, ad-hoc tracking.

solution.text: Trai Inc built a professional website to showcase Dashak Pharma's product range and business credibility, paired with a custom CRM to manage customer relationships, track orders, and streamline follow-ups.

results.text: Dashak Pharma now operates with a professional online presence and a centralized CRM — giving the team a reliable system to manage relationships and operations as the business grows.

hero.title: A digital presence and CRM built for a Mahindra dealership

introduction.text: Om Group, a Mahindra automobile dealership in Raebareli, needed a professional website and a CRM to bring structure to how they manage leads, inquiries, and customer relationships.

challenge.text: Managing customer inquiries and follow-ups without a centralized system made it easy for leads to fall through the cracks — a costly gap in a business where timely follow-up directly affects sales.

solution.text: Trai Inc built a website for Om Group's online presence, along with a custom CRM to manage leads, inquiries, and customer follow-ups in one centralized system.

results.text: Om Group now runs on a centralized CRM alongside a professional website — giving the dealership a structured, reliable way to manage customer relationships from first inquiry to sale.
